context: Tests whether the agent preserves sibling-skill boundaries when a prompt mentions accessories but primarily needs HomeKit/Matter guidance.

checklist.name: Routes HomeKit
checklist.description: Identifies HomeKit/Matter or the homekit skill/domain as the owner for the smart-home implementation.

checklist.name: Homes rooms
checklist.description: States that homes, rooms, and smart-home accessory organization belong to HomeKit/Matter guidance.

checklist.name: Characteristics
checklist.description: States that reading and writing HMAccessory characteristics belongs to HomeKit guidance.

checklist.name: Automations
checklist.description: States that action sets, triggers, or automations belong to HomeKit guidance.

checklist.name: Matter onboarding
checklist.description: States that Matter commissioning/onboarding belongs to HomeKit/MatterSupport guidance, not AccessorySetupKit.

checklist.name: ASK boundary
checklist.description: Limits AccessorySetupKit to Bluetooth/Wi-Fi discovery, picker authorization, session events, and migration.

checklist.name: Post-setup handoff
checklist.description: Explains that post-setup communication can hand off to CoreBluetooth or NetworkExtension, not HomeKit automation logic.

checklist.name: No code
checklist.description: Does not produce implementation code for the smart-home app.

checklist.name: Route examples
checklist.description: Includes examples of tasks that should route away from AccessorySetupKit, such as rooms, characteristics, automations, or Matter commissioning.

checklist.name: No collapse
checklist.description: Does not collapse HomeKit/Matter guidance into the lower-level accessory discovery skill.
